i want to distort or warp this svg in a specific way how can i achieve that  
i need to find a way to manipulate the svg to create a distortion effect  
i should use transformation properties like skew or scale to achieve the desired effect  
i need to apply these transformations to the relevant elements of the svg  
i should test different transformations to see what effect they have on the svg  

***  

i can use css to apply transformations to the svg elements  
i can use the transform attribute with skew or scale to distort the svg  
i can use the transform-origin attribute to control the distortion point  
i can use the transform-style attribute to enable 3d transformations  
i should test different values to achieve the desired distortion effect
